site.name: One Click Gift
site.tagline: Stop the endless search. The perfect gift for every person and every occasion.

filters.legal: Links on this site go to Amazon products and are affiliate links. If you buy through them, we earn a small commission at no extra cost to you — and you skip the endless searching.
filters.cta: Use the filters and find the perfect gift — no hassle!

home.no_results: No matches for that combination. Try adjusting filters or a different budget.
home.demo_description: Some products are showing placeholder data while you finalize the commercial integration.

footer.affiliate: As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases.
footer.price_disclaimer: We display approximate price ranges. Prices may vary slightly. The final price is always on Amazon — always verify before buying.

seo.home_title: One Click Gift - Perfect Gift Ideas
seo.home_description: Find the perfect gift for everyone in your life without wasting time. Curated selection by profile and budget.
